name: Aptera Motors Corp
summary: PART I Overview Aptera Motors Corp. was formed on March 4, 2019 under the laws of the state of Delaware, and is headquartered in Carlsbad, California. Our principal business is the development, production, and distribution of energy efficient solar-powered, battery-electric vehicles. Our mission is to create the most efficient transportation on the planet, where every journey is powered by the sun.
